case_title: PUTNAM, STEVE et al VS BRUCE, PETER DBA BELLE FINE WEDDINGS PHOTO & VIDEO

docket_entries.description: DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED;TO FOLDER,TO TRAY
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA BELLE FINE WEDDINGS PHOTO & VIDEO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUTNAM, STEVE PUTNAM, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA BELLE FINE WEDDINGS PHOTO & VIDEO DEFT IS ORDERED TO TURN OVER TO PLAINTIFF ALL VIDEO TAKEN AT OR DURING PLTF'S WEDDING EVENT; VIDEO SHALL BE IN UNEDITED FORM. VIDEO TO BE TRUNED OVER TO PLTF BY CERTIFIED MAIL, FED EX OR SIMILAR DELIVERY SYSTEM OR PERSONAL DELIVERY AS THE PARTIES SHALL AGREE, W/IN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS JUDGEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRUCE, PETER DBA BELLE FINE WEDDINGS PHOTO & VIDEO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PUTNAM, STEVE PUTNAM, JENNIFER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY BRUCE, PETER DBA BELLE FINE WEDDINGS PHOTO & VIDEO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PUTNAM, STEVE PUTNAM, JENNIFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-31-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-24-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PUTNAM, STEVE PUTNAM, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA BELLE FINE WEDDINGS PHOTO & VIDEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
